zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Burke of Clanicarde於1390年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威可藍利卡爾德時，她的父親Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde26歲，母親Agnes Beauchamp20歲。她與James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1435年在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Burke of Clanicarde于1390年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 高威可藍利卡爾德时，她的父亲Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde26岁，母亲Agnes Beauchamp20岁。她与James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1435年在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).
German: variant of   Burk  .

variants.name: Burton
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
French (northeastern): regional variant of   Berton  .

variants.name: Burkett
meanings: English: from an Old English personal name, Burgheard, composed of the elements burh, burg ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + heard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The name was reintroduced into Middle English by the Normans in the forms Bou(r)chart, Bocard.

English: possibly also from a Middle English personal name Burcard, Burchard (Norman Burcard, Old French Burchard), which was imported by the Normans and derives from ancient Germanic Burghard (in the form Burkhard this was a very popular medieval German name; see Burkhart ), cognate with the Old English name above. In France this gives rise to the surname Bouchard , Bouchart, but evidence for its use in Norman England is difficult to pin down and modern surnames in Burch- often have a different origin altogether.
English: variant of   Birkett  , a spelling commonly found in northern England.

variants.name: Bourke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Murphy.
Irish: variant of   Burke  .
Americanized form of French   Bourg   or of its altered form   Bourque  .

variants.name: Burgh
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burkeen
meanings: American pet form of Irish   Burke  , not found as a surname in Ireland.
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Bürgin (see Burgin ).

variants.name: Borke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz.
German (also Börke): from a pet form of a Slavic personal name containing the element bor ‘to fight’.
German (also Börke): topographic name for someone living near a pine forest, from Slavic bor ‘pine tree, fir tree, coniferous forest’.

variants.name: Duxbury
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Duxbury in Lancashire, recorded in the early 13th century as D(e)ukesbiri, from the genitive case of the Old English personal name Deowuc or Duc(c) (both of uncertain origin) + Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ).

variants.name: Borrowman
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian and Dumfriesshire): status name from Middle English burghman, borughman (Old English burhmann) ‘inhabitant of a (fortified) town’ (see Burke ), especially one holding land or buildings by burgage (see Burgess ).

variants.name: Burman
meanings: English: status name, from Middle English burghman, borughman (Old English burhmann) ‘inhabitant of a (fortified) town’ (see Burke ), especially one holding land or buildings by burgage (see Burgess ).
English: variant of   Bowerman  .
Americanized form of German Buhrmann or Bührmann.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Marie. See Mary .

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Burke of Clanicarde was born in 1390, in Clanricarde, County Galway, Ireland, her father, Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Beauchamp, was 20. She married James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1435, in Waterford, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Burke of Clanicarde est née en 1390, à Clanricarde, County Galway, Irlande, son père, Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Beauchamp, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1435, à Waterford, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Burke of Clanicarde 1390 in Clanricarde, County Galway, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Beauchamp 20. Sie hat James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1435 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Waterford, County Waterford, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Burke of Clanicarde è nata il nel 1390 nel Clanricarde, County Galway, Irlanda, sua padre, Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Beauchamp, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Burke of Clanicardeが1390年にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイクランリカードで生まれた時，父Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricardeは26歳，母Agnes Beauchampは20歳であった。James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1435年にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードワテルフォードで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Burke of Clanicarde(이)가 1390년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 클랜리카드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Beauchamp(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 왓르퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Burke of Clanicarde nasceu em 1390, em Clanricarde, County Galway, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Beauchamp, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1435, em Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Burke of Clanicarde родилась в 1390 г. в местности кланрикард, коунти галвеи, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Beauchamp, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1435 г. в местности вэитирфорд, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Burke of Clanicarde nació en 1390, en Clanricarde, County Galway, Irlanda, su papá, Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Beauchamp, tenía 20 años. Se casó con James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1435, en Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 45 años.
